title: Treasure After the Bell
description: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami! Wake up the guys!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's make off with the gold!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Be quiet! You're talking too loud!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Your voice is waaayy louder than mine!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: of lovely morning to you, cNami!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Chief! We found the Golden Bell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn it! We still need more people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the pride of our ancesral city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: One more time, everyone! One... two... three!

summary: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
